title: Kick streamer Clavicular pursues criminal and civil charges after being slapped in club
summary_full: Kick streamer Clavicular faced a shocking on-stage slap during a live club stream after a public disagreement. Thousands witnessed the incident, which led to the woman's detainment and police involvement. Clavicular intends to press criminal charges and pursue a civil lawsuit, aiming to set a precedent against public assault during live broadcasts.
